title: Proctor Silex Electric Coffee Grinder for Beans, Spices and More, Stainless Steel Blades, 12 Cups, White
description:
About this item
SIMPLE AND INTUITIVE: The electric coffee grinder is so simple to use that you'll want to drink flavorful coffee made from freshly ground coffee beans everyday. Just press the button to grind coffee and release to stop grinding.
NO ACCIDENTAL STARTS OR SPILLS: The built-in interlock prevents the coffee bean grinder from turning on when the safety on/off button is pressed unless the lid is locked securely in place.
POWERFUL PERFORMANCE AND PROVEN DURABILITY: The grinding blades on this small coffee grinder are made of durable stainless steel to grind coffee for brewing cup after delicious cup for years to come.
GRINDS ENOUGH COFFEE TO BREW UP TO 12 CUPS: If you love the delicious taste of coffee made from freshly ground coffee beans, this coffee grinder is perfect for you. Make a quick cup or a full pot.
GREAT FOR GRINDING HERBS & SPICES: Conveniently grind peppercorns, fennel and other herbs and spices for recipes or to keep on hand in the kitchen. Also great for grinding sesame, flax, chia and other seeds for smoothies, protein shakes or to add to food.
reviews_5s: I am enjoying using this mini grinder for coffee. I already have 2 other Burr style grinders, both loaded with different types of coffee which I use regularly on a daily basis. I use this one to make a one or 2 cup pot of a different, ie specialty or decaff coffee, when I'm in the mood for somthing different. It's compact, powerful enough to do a good effecient grind, and relatively easy to clean. the only downfall in this model, is that coffee always seems to stick to the side walls after grinding, so i have to gently scrape the residual coffee powder off the sides before putting it away. I haven't used it for spices yet, though I imagine it should do a nice job. it seem well designed and I'm satified for the price paid and don't need to buy another one!Great grinder. Used for peppercorn and coffee. Worked great. Get a little brush and clean it. Recommend at this price.This company has been around a long time. I really enjoy this coffee grinder. I’ve used it for my spices too. It’s convenient small enough where it doesn’t take up any space definitely worth the money. easy to use cleans well as far as noisy I don’t think so. Just sounds like a regular grinder, but it works very quick and efficient so you don’t have to grind too long. Good quality.This is the second proctor silex coffee grinder I've bought. My first one, I've been using for about 10 yrs now. It is very durable and I love the design, so easy to use! Now, I decided to buy one for my son's house when I visit. The blade has stayed sharp for years. The top is easy to remove to add the beans. Just press the button and it starts. Very functional! After it blends, take the to of and pour it into a container. And the cord is pretty long, as you can see in the picture. No spilling and no mess. I highly recommend proctor silence over any other company. And it's a great price!Exactly as title says. This thing grinds coffee beans quickly. Takes about 10 seconds to grind 2 scoops of beans into coffee grind. The only part I'd like done better is to have an easier way to get the coffee grind out of the device afterwards. Not a big deal, but you will definitely need to have a narrow spoon or scooper nearby. Considering how inexpensive this product is, that is something I can overlook. I mean, this thing costs less than a manual grinder, and grinds much faster, so you can spend more time drinking your coffee, instead of making it.Easy to use and clean. Perfect grind every time! Convenient and easy size to store.Just started to use coffee beans so I needed a coffee grinder. This one is easy to use and works well. You do not need an expensive one to grind your beans!Many years ago this was the first grinder I purchased. Then I thought I'd buy something more expensive. And they all proved not to do as well as this one. This grinds so well I bought a second one for spices. Highly recommend.I bought this grinder 6-7 years ago and still love it. My friend needed a good grinder so I ordered this one for her at Christmas. She loves it as much as I do!It’s nice and compact and does a great job grinding. Why spend big bucks when this one does the same job for half the price
reviews_1s:
it does its work but when you finish grinding all the espresso gets stuck to the walls of the grinder so it’s hard to take it outWorked great twice then motor just quit let it sit over night thinking maybe it would start working again but No thatwas it!!!!!!Used product for about 10 months and it worked fine until recently and then turned into a highly dangerous piece of machinery.

The grinder now automatically turns on as soon as it is plugged in whether or not the guard/lid is on. This means whirring blades are exposed. This nearly caused finger dismemberment for me.

The company states they have a year warranty on it. There is no way to actually get the warranty enforced. They request an email which just never gets responded to no matter how many times you email them.

Garbage product and garbage company.I had three old coffee grinders in various locations and one gave out so I needed a replacement. They were all old school and roughly the same size - the size home coffee grinders used to always be - and they lasted forever. Apparently the manufacturing powers that be have now decided to make coffee grinders smaller and weaker. This says enough for a 12 cup coffee grinder and if you like your coffee at all strong, as strong as recommended by every article I have read about how much coffee to use, then that is pretty much bs. And when I fill the unit up it really struggles to get through the beans. So now I need to start looking again and seeing if these manufacturers actually give a volume measurement for the capacity of their units so I can find one closer to what used to be the usual size.I purchased this product and it would not turn off. Literally the blade wouldn’t stop until the cord was unplugged. Very dangerous. I reached out to the company but they took forever to respond and then they said they couldn’t help, to contact Amazon. Speed is too fast. Definitely a glitch. Very offsetting noise too!The motor was surprisingly loud even though it fit only half of what my old grinder fit. It then started grinding as soon as I plugged it in, posing a hazard, operating even without the lid on. Do not recommend!This item is tiny. The base where cover goes flimsy. It’s like a child’s toy. Website said stainless steel. It’s toy plastic. Won’t give me my back.Not what I expected, didn’t grind as well as was said on hereThrew it away. Would not work a second time. Even after unplugging it and letting it sit for a few daysI used this to grind spices, cleaned it, and put it in the cabinet. Nine months later when I went to use it again, the blades would not turn.
